title_slide.title: Autoreport
subtitle: Template-aware PPTX autofill engine
Turn one template into repeatable decks

slides.title: Why Teams Use Autoreport
body: Reuse existing templates instead of rebuilding recurring slides by hand.
Keep deck structure deterministic enough for reviewable automation.

slides.title: Demo Surfaces
body: Use the CLI for scripted generation or the web demo for quick iteration.
Both entry points share the same validation and PowerPoint pipeline.
